title: xanthophyllum venosum
intro: Xanthophyllum venosum is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum venosum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, often used in traditional medicine to address various health issues.
